title.description: An engaging, viral-optimized title for the YouTube Short. Must be under 60 characters and include an emotional or curiosity-driven hook.

description.description: A 2-3 sentence description of the video content, encouraging viewers to subscribe.

hashtags.description: A list of 3-5 highly relevant, viral hashtags (e.g., '#vintage', '#history'). Do not include the '#' symbol in the strings.
